changes.new: Just like you need a mailing address to receive a letter from a friend, your device needs an IP address to receive information on the internet.

changes.new: ⓘ For registered users of the Meta Products ⓘ For registered users under the age of majority (under 18, in most applicable countries) who have a limited ability to enter into an enforceable contract only, where we may be unable to process your information on the grounds of contractual necessity.
changes.explanation: The updated policy introduces or expands the purposes for which your data is used (e.g., advertising, analytics, research, or security) or clarifies the legal basis for processing.
changes.suggested_action: Check whether you are comfortable with these purposes and, where applicable, adjust your consent or opt-out preferences.

changes.new: In our interest to secure our platform and network, to verify accounts and activity, to combat harmful conduct, to detect, prevent, and address spam and other bad experiences, to keep the Meta Company Products free of harmful or inappropriate content, and to investigate and take action in respect of suspicious activity or breaches of our terms or policies; and
changes.explanation: The updated policy describes new or enhanced security measures to protect your data, such as encryption, access controls, or monitoring.
changes.suggested_action: This may improve protection of your data. You can still review details to understand what changed.

changes.old: Meta performs regular security and vulnerability testing to assess whether key controls are properly implemented and effective. Meta has a vulnerability management program that includes definition of roles and responsibilities, dedicated ownership of vulnerability monitoring, vulnerability risk assessment and patch deployment.Meta’s security team is responsible for the detection, triage and remediation of vulnerabilities in Meta’s hardware and software. Meta leverages various tools to detect security bugs in its code base, as well as in open-source and third-party code, in order to mitigate or fix security bugs before they make it into shipped Meta’s products and impact our customers.Llama API benefits from Meta’s commitment to the security of your data which manifests through the monitoring, controls and measures we have in place to pre-empt or respond to security risks.
changes.new: Promoting safety, integrity and security on and across the Meta Products: The Meta Products are designed to help ensure the safety, integrity and security of those services and those people who enjoy them.
